data.current_summary: Get active matchday/group for a league
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the currently active matchday or group for a specified league. This operation returns the Group object containing the current round/matchday information, which is useful for determining which matches are currently being played. Requires the league shortcut identifier as input.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. However, description is completely missing. Added explanation of what the operation returns (Group object), its purpose (determining current round), and input requirements for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Get matches for a team around current date
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves matches for a specified team within a time window relative to the current date. Accepts a team filter string to identify the team, and parameters for the number of weeks to look back (weekCountPast) and forward (weekCountFuture) from today. Returns a list of Match objects matching the criteria, ordered chronologically.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about parameters (team filter string, week count parameters), the time window logic, and expected return format (list of Match objects) to help AI agents understand how to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Get matches for a specific group/matchday
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all matches for a specific group (matchday/round) within a league season. Requires leagueShortcut (e.g., 'BL1'), leagueSeason (e.g., 2023), and groupOrderId (the group/matchday number) as path parameters. Returns an array of Match objects for that group. Use this to retrieve matches organized by matchday or tournament round.
